tools.name: search_published_ads
tools.description: Search for published vehicle advertisements (cars only) with filters and pagination. Returns a list of car ads matching the search criteria including make, model, price, location, and other attributes.INSTRUCTIONS:1. This tool automatically filters for cars category (category_id = 29). 2. Location filtering by city uses coordinate-based distance search (lat, lon, dist).3. Use filters always when possible, and fallback to 'query' field when filters don't yield results.
